tool.name: Capture Analog Card
tool.description: Capture the initial analogy hypothesis between two systems (Phase 1). Records system descriptions, the hypothesized structural correspondence, and predicted transfers.

generative_potential.description: Why this analogy might be generative - what insights could transfer

predicted_transfer.description: A concrete implication to be tested

scary_mismatch.description: What's most likely to break the analogy

scope_hint.description: Boundaries of where the analogy applies

ai.systemPromptSection:
### capture_analog_card
Capture an initial analogy hypothesis. This is Phase 1 of the Collapse Engine workflow.

usageExamples.input: {"session_id": "sess-123", "system_a": {"name": "Statistical Mechanics", "domain": "physics", "description": "Study of large ensembles of particles", "key_principles": ["Partition function", "Free energy minimization"]}, "system_b": {"name": "Neural Network Training", "domain": "machine_learning", "description": "Optimization of neural network parameters"}, "hypothesis": "Loss landscape optimization corresponds to free energy minimization", "generative_potential": "Temperature scheduling in SGD may benefit from simulated annealing insights", "confidence": 0.7}

whenToUse: Starting to explore an analogy formally
User has identified two potentially corresponding systems
